availableForSegmentation.description: Whether the property is available as a filter to create segments.

canRead.description: Whether the visitor's browser is allowed to retrieve the value for this property.

canWrite.description: Whether the visitor's browser is allowed to write a (new) value into this property.

createNewProfile.description: Whether a visitor will switch to a new profile when a new value for the profile property is set. This will prevent potential profile hijacking. Only applicable when "indexed" is "true." This is only relevant for profile properties, not group properties.

creationDate.description: The creation date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

dataSensitivity.description: The data sensitivity for the property.

filterType.description: The filtertype of the property. Note that changing the type might lead to loss of information.

groupTypeId.description: The ID of the group type that this property belongs to. Blank for profile properties.

indexed.description: Specifies that the profile property holds a unique value for each profile. When enabled, the property is indexed and used as a unique identifier.

isIdProperty.description: Whether this is a property that contains references to groups (only relevant to profile properties of type 'Group ID').

lastModifiedDate.description: The last modified date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

lastProfileMutationDate.description: The last time a profile has been updated.

linkingGroupTypeId.description: The ID of the group type that this profile property contains the group references for (only applicable to profile properties).

mergeStrategy.description: The merge strategy of the property.

permissionLevel.description: The permission level of the property.

precision.description: The precision of a property, e.g. 3. Only applicable when the “filterType” is "DECIMAL."

profileCount.description: Number of profiles that have a value for this property.

showInUI.description: Whether the property is shown in the segments UI. Only applicable when "isAvailableForSegmentation" is "true."

totalProfileCount.description: The total number of profiles that have a value for this property.

useValidation.description: Whether the value should be validated according to the validation rules of the filter type.

values.description: When selecting this property as filter for segmentation, these values will be selectable next to the values that are in the profiles. Only applicable when "availableForSegmentation" is "true".

items.description: When selecting this property as filter for segmentation, these values will be selectable next to the values that are in the profiles. Only applicable when "availableForSegmentation" is "true".
